---

# 🔍 MSBuild Project Review — ContosoApp Solution

## Solution Overview

| File | SDK | Packages | Custom Targets |
|------|-----|----------|---------------|
| `ContosoApp.Core.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk | 2 | PrintBuildInfo |
| `ContosoApp.Services.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk | 2 | PrintBuildInfo |
| `ContosoApp.Api.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web | 3 | PrintBuildInfo |
| `ContosoApp.Core.Tests.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk | 4 | — |
| `ContosoApp.Api.Tests.csproj` | Microsoft.NET.Sdk | 4 | — |

No `Directory.Build.props`, `Directory.Build.targets`, `Directory.Packages.props`, `global.json`, or `.editorconfig` found.

---

## 🔴 Errors (Likely to cause build issues)

### 1. Package version drift — same package at different versions across projects

This is the most dangerous issue. Three shared packages have **inconsistent versions** across projects that will coexist at runtime:

| Package | Core | Services | Api | Core.Tests | Api.Tests |
|---------|------|----------|-----|------------|-----------|
| `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions` | **8.0.0** | **8.0.1** | **8.0.0** | — | — |
| `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` | — | — | — | **17.10.0** | **17.9.0** |
| `xunit` | — | — | — | **2.8.1** | **2.7.1** |
| `xunit.runner.visualstudio` | — | — | — | **2.8.1** | **2.5.6** |

The `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions` mismatch is especially concerning: `Core` and `Api` use **8.0.0**, but `Services` uses **8.0.1**. Since `Api` references both `Core` and `Services`, NuGet will unify to the highest version at restore time, but the explicit mismatch signals an uncontrolled drift that **will get worse over time**. The test framework version divergence means the two test projects may behave differently or have different bug fixes.

---

## 🟡 Warnings (Anti-patterns that should be fixed)

### 2. Massive property duplication across all 5 projects

**Every single project** repeats these 7 properties verbatim:

```xml
<TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
<Nullable>enable</Nullable>
<ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
<TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
<EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
<Company>Contoso</Company>
<Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
```

That's **35 duplicated lines** (7 properties × 5 files). When you need to change the target framework to `net9.0`, you'll need to edit 5 files and hope you don't miss one. This is the textbook use case for `Directory.Build.props`.

### 3. Duplicated `DocumentationFile` property in all 3 src projects

All three source projects repeat:
```xml
<DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
```
This is in a **separate `<PropertyGroup>`** in each file (lines 18-20 in Core, 23-25 in Services, 24-26 in Api), splitting what should be a single block. Should be centralized and merged.

### 4. Identical `PrintBuildInfo` target copy-pasted across 3 src projects

This exact target appears in `Core`, `Services`, and `Api`:
```xml
<Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build">
  <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
</Target>
```
Copy-pasted targets are a maintenance liability — if you improve the message format, you must edit 3 files. This belongs in `Directory.Build.targets`.

### 5. No Central Package Management (CPM)

With 5 projects and 8 distinct packages (several shared), versions are scattered across individual `.csproj` files. This is how the version drift in finding #1 happened. CPM via `Directory.Packages.props` with `<ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>` would eliminate this entire class of problem.

### 6. No `global.json` — SDK version unpinned

Without `global.json`, different developers and CI machines may use different SDK versions, leading to non-reproducible builds. This is especially important since you target `net8.0`.

---

## 🔵 Suggestions (Improvements for maintainability)

### 7. Split `PropertyGroup` blocks in src projects should be merged

In `Core.csproj`, `Services.csproj`, and `Api.csproj`, there are two `<PropertyGroup>` blocks — one with the main settings and a separate one just for `<DocumentationFile>`. Since there's no condition differentiating them, these should be a single block for readability.

### 8. `System.Text.Json` may be redundant for net8.0

`Core` and `Api` explicitly reference `System.Text.Json` version `8.0.5`. This package is **in-box** for `net8.0` (it ships as part of the shared framework). The explicit reference is only needed if you specifically need the patched `8.0.5` version (e.g., for a security fix). If so, document the reason with a comment. If not, remove it — the in-box version is sufficient.

### 9. Test projects missing `xunit.runner.visualstudio` PrivateAssets

The `xunit.runner.visualstudio` package is a build/test-time tool only. While test projects are typically leaf nodes (nothing references them), adding `PrivateAssets="all"` is good hygiene:
```xml
<PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="..." PrivateAssets="all" />
```

---

## 🟢 Positive (Things done well)

- ✅ **SDK-style projects** — all projects use modern SDK-style format, no legacy cruft
- ✅ **Nullable reference types enabled** across the board
- ✅ **TreatWarningsAsErrors** enforced in all projects — good code quality discipline
- ✅ **EnforceCodeStyleInBuild** enabled — ensures consistent style in CI
- ✅ **IsPackable=false** on test projects — correctly prevents accidental NuGet packaging
- ✅ **Clean project references** — dependency graph is sensible (Core ← Services ← Api)
- ✅ **XML documentation** enabled for all source projects

---

## 🛠️ Recommended Fix: Concrete Restructuring Plan

Here's what the solution should look like after applying all fixes:

### New file: `Directory.Build.props` (repo root)

```xml
<Project>

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
    <Company>Contoso</Company>
    <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Source projects generate XML docs -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Test projects are not packable -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>
```

### New file: `Directory.Build.targets` (repo root)

```xml
<Project>

  <!-- Shared build info target for src projects only -->
  <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build"
          Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
  </Target>

</Project>
```

### New file: `Directory.Packages.props` (repo root — Central Package Management)

```xml
<Project>

  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <!-- Shared -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" Version="6.5.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <!-- Test infrastructure -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.10.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="NSubstitute" Version="5.1.0" />
  </ItemGroup>

</Project>
```

### New file: `global.json` (repo root)

```json
{
  "sdk": {
    "version": "8.0.400",
    "rollForward": "latestFeature"
  }
}
```

### Simplified project files after restructuring

**`ContosoApp.Core.csproj`** — from 26 lines to 8:

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" />

</Project>
```
